title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his playbook for bootstrapping to $10M ARR without external funding. The episode covers reasons to bootstrap, strategies for hitting $1M ARR in 117 days, differences between early and later growth stages, churn reduction, product-led growth, SEO and AEO strategy, outbound tactics, pricing experiments, and decision-making frameworks.
